nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Daffydd was born in 1320, in Ystrad Mynach, Caerphilly, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Dafydd ap Einion, was 35 and her mother, Gwenlian ferch Dafydd, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Adda Goch ap Ieuaf of Trevor. She died in 1416, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 96.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Adda Goch ap Ieuaf of Trevor. Elle est décédée en 1416, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 96 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Daffyddが1320年にイギリスウェールズケエルフィリーイストラド ムイナチで生まれた時，父Dafydd ap Einionは35歳，母Gwenlian ferch Dafyddは20歳であった。彼女はAdda Goch ap Ieuaf of Trevorとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1416年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンで96歳で死去した。

ko.Treforest, Rhondda Cynon Taff, Wales: 영국 웨일스 호다 신넌 타프 트레포레스트
ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Daffydd(이)가 1320년 영국 웨일스 카이르필리 이스트래드 마이나치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd ap Einion(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenlian ferch Dafydd(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Adda Goch ap Ieuaf of Trevor(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Daffydd родилась в 1320 г. в местности истрад минач, каирфилли, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Dafydd ap Einion было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenlian ferch Dafydd, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Adda Goch ap Ieuaf of Trevor. Она умерла в 1416 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 96 лет.
